description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a muscular build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally. He has a defined jawline and prominent facial features, with medium-length hair swept back from the forehead. The figure is dressed in a fitted short-sleeve shirt tucked into belted straight-leg pants, giving a casual yet neat appearance. The pants have visible seams and pockets, and the shirt fits closely to the torso, accentuating the figure's physique. He wears sturdy, low-profile shoes suitable for walking on urban surfaces. The overall look is that of a modern city dweller, ready for everyday activities in an urban environment.
description: A stylized adult male in a fitted shirt and belted pants, standing upright with arms outstretched. The figure has swept-back hair and wears sturdy shoes, presenting a casual urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, swept-back hair, fitted shirt, belted pants, and shoes, with arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the contour of the torso, and the straight-leg pants, with the arm and hand visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shirt, and pants, with the belt and back pockets visible, and both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the face, torso, and leg, with the arm and hand in profile.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve shirt and straight-leg pants with a belt
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
